steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify task has no dependencies; record empty deps report.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create mandatory task folder structure including assets/library subdir.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review t0002 Wang2023 Plan-and-Solve summary to ground prompt template and execution loop.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no new external information needed; LangChain Plan-and-Execute reference is sufficient.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Skipped: no prior project library to reuse; t0006 sister task not yet merged.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Plan API surface, trajectory schema, prompt template, deterministic-test mode, and tests.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: local-only deterministic library; no GPU.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Implement PlanAndSolveAgent in code/, register library asset, run tests.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: write-library task type does not require creative-thinking.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results files documenting API surface, test pass count, and verification.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: write-library task does not produce comparable performance metrics.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions including the matched-mismatch (C) library.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, mark task completed.
